meaning: n.餐巾,餐巾纸,<英>尿布,<美>月经带
examples: Her father cleaned his glasses with a paper napkin.
He picked the napkin from his lap and placed it alongside his plate.
He picked up my napkin and turned it over.
She went back in without the wig on and pieces of napkin still stuck to her head.
She briefly left, took off her wig and wiped off her bald head with a paper napkin.
